raw_sms: You received GHS 1,000.00 from FRANCIS APPIAH 0249876543. Trans.ID: 7391048265. Fee: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 0.00. New balance: GHS 2,150.00. 25/03/2026 22:10.
label: suspicious
notes: TEXT DEVIATION: 'You received' not 'You have received'. 'Trans.ID:' not 'Transaction ID:'. 'New balance:' not 'Your new balance is'. E-levy 0.00 on GHS 1000 (should be 10.00). Wording and field labels differ from canonical template.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 3,000.00 from PRINCE OWUSU 0241111234. Transaction ID: 8473920165. E-levy: GHS 30.00. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. Your new balance is GHS 3,070.00. 26/03/2026 03:14.
label: suspicious
notes: FIELD ORDER: E-levy line appears BEFORE Fee line. Real MTN template always has 'Fee charged' first then 'E-levy'. Content values are correct but field sequence is swapped.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 500.00 from KWAKU MENSAH (0271234567). Transaction ID: 5839201748. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 5.00. Your new balance is GHS 502.50. 26/03/2026 14:03.
label: suspicious
notes: FORMAT: Phone number in parentheses '(0271234567)' — real MTN uses bare number without parens. Also balance math: 502.50 = prev + 500 - 5 → prev = 7.50 which is plausible but suspicious for GHS 500 inflow.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 750.00 from OWUSU AFRIYIE 0551234567. Transaction ID: 1029384756. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 7.50. Your new balance is GHS 1,892.50. Ref: MP260327.1955. 27/03/2026 19:55.
label: suspicious
notes: EXTRA FIELD: 'Ref: MP260327.1955' is not part of any real MTN template. Real SMS never includes a separate Ref line. Also transaction ID 1029384756 duplicates sample #3.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 2,000.00 from Ama Serwaa 0201234567. Transaction ID: 8472615308. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 20.00. Your new balance is GHS 4,480.00. 27/03/2026 08:33.
label: suspicious
notes: CASING: Name is Title Case 'Ama Serwaa' not ALL CAPS. Real MTN system always renders names in UPPERCASE. Otherwise template is correct.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 5,000.00 from RICHARD BOATENG 0249871234. Transaction ID: 48293OI762. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 50.00. Your new balance is GHS 5,150.00. 27/03/2026 23:48.
label: suspicious
notes: TXN ID: Contains letters 'O' and 'I' mixed with digits ('48293OI762'). Real MTN transaction IDs are pure numeric. Easy to miss visually as O/0 and I/1 are similar.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 800.00 from MERCY ADOM 0249876543. Transaction ID: 7384920163. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 8.00. Balance: GHS 3,292.00. 28/03/2026 10:44.
label: suspicious
notes: FIELD LABEL: 'Balance: GHS' instead of 'Your new balance is GHS'. Real MTN template always says 'Your new balance is GHS'. Shortened label deviates from system-generated format.

raw_sms: Cash In GHS 1,500.00 from agent BENJAMIN OFORI 0261111222. Transaction ID: 3948201756. Your new balance is GHS 1,500.00. 28/03/2026 13:20.
label: suspicious
notes: TEMPLATE: 'Cash In GHS' missing 'of' — real template is 'Cash In of GHS'. Also 'from agent' instead of 'at agent'. Two small wording changes from canonical cash-in format.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 4,000.00 from KWAME BOAKYE +233241234987. Transaction ID: 8493027163. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 40.00. Your new balance is GHS 4,010.00. 28/03/2026 16:31.
label: suspicious
notes: PHONE FORMAT: Uses '+233241234987' international format. Real MTN MoMo SMS always uses local format '024XXXXXXX' for Ghana-to-Ghana. Also 12 digits after +233 instead of 9.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 280.00 from SAMUEL ASANTE 0541234567. Transaction ID: 7482930165. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 2.80. Your new balance is GHS 6,477.20. Date: 28/03/2026 21:02.
label: suspicious
notes: DATE LABEL: 'Date: 28/03/2026 21:02.' has explicit 'Date:' prefix. Real MTN SMS shows bare datetime at end with no label. Subtle template deviation.

raw_sms: URGENT: You have received GHS 10,000.00 on your MoMo wallet. To confirm this deposit click here: http://mtn-momo-gh.xyz/confirm and enter your PIN to complete. Act now before it expires!
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: STRUCTURE: No txn ID / balance / fee / counterparty / date. Contains URL + PIN request + urgency. Template completely different from any MTN format.

raw_sms: MTN MoMo: Dear customer your account has been credited with GHS 5,000.00. Verify your account immediately by sending your MoMo PIN to 0209999999 to avoid reversal of funds.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: WORDING: 'MTN MoMo:' prefix + 'Dear customer' salutation — not how real MTN SMS starts. 'credited' not 'received'. Asks user to TEXT PIN. No txn ID / balance / fee / date.

raw_sms: Congratulations! You have won GHS 15,000.00 in MTN MoMo promo draw. To claim your prize send GHS 50.00 to 0248888777 as processing fee. Your code: MTN2026WINNER. Reply YES.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: COMPLETELY WRONG TEMPLATE: Prize/promo language has zero overlap with any transaction notification template. No standard fields at all. Asks victim to send money.

raw_sms: You have recieved GHS 3,500.00 into your MTN MoMo acount. Due to system maintanance your funds are on hold. Call 0207777321 imediately to release your funds before they are reversed.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: SPELLING: 'recieved' 'acount' 'maintanance' 'imediately' = 4 errors. Real MTN SMS is machine-generated with zero typos. Also 'into your MTN MoMo account' is wrong template. No txn ID / balance / fee / counterparty / date.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 2,000.00 from JAMES MENSAH 0241234567. Transaction ID: 1111111111. Fee charged: GHS 0.00. E-levy: GHS 0.00. Your new balance is GHS 2,000.00. IMPORTANT: Due to new regulations verify at https://mtn-ghana-verify.com/tx within 24hrs or funds reversed.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: HYBRID: First half mimics genuine template but txn ID is all 1s (fabricated pattern). E-levy = 0 on GHS 2000 (wrong). Second half appends phishing URL + urgency — real MTN SMS never has a second paragraph.

raw_sms: Your MoMo wallet has been credited with GHS 7,500.00. For your safety please confirm by entering your PIN at http://secure-mtn-gh.com/verify. Transaction will expire if not verified within 1 hour.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: WORDING: 'credited' + 'Your MoMo wallet' — not MTN phrasing. 'For your safety' is social engineering. URL + PIN + 1-hour deadline. No txn ID / counterparty / balance / fee / date.

raw_sms: Dear valued customer GHS 1,000.00 has been deposited into your MoMo by an anonymous benefactor. To accept funds reply with your full name date of birth and MoMo PIN to this number.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: WORDING: 'Dear valued customer' + 'deposited into your MoMo' + 'anonymous benefactor' — none of these phrases appear in any MTN template. Asks for name + DOB + PIN (identity theft). No standard fields.

raw_sms: ALERT: Someone tried to withdraw GHS 4,000.00 from your MoMo. If not you dial *170# enter PIN press 0 to block. Or call 0207654321 now to secure your account.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: TEMPLATE TYPE: Fake security alert — not a transaction notification at all. 'ALERT:' prefix never used by MTN MoMo. Tricks user into entering PIN via USSD. No standard transaction fields.

raw_sms: Dear customer you have received GHC 6,000 in ur MoMo wallet from CHIEF NANA OSEI. Pls kindly send back GHC 3,000 to 0249999888 as it was sent by mistake. God bless you.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: CURRENCY: 'GHC' is old Ghana Cedi code (pre-2007). Real MTN uses 'GHS'. WORDING: 'Dear customer' + 'ur' + 'Pls kindly' = informal human language not system-generated. Asks victim to 'send back' money. No txn ID / balance / fee / date.

raw_sms: You have received GHS 8,000.00. Txn: 00001. Bal: GHS 8,000.00. NOTICE: High-value transaction requires extra verification. Send your PIN and Ghana Card number to 0207654321 within 30 mins.
label: likely_fraudulent
notes: ABBREVIATIONS: 'Txn:' 'Bal:' — real MTN never abbreviates. 'NOTICE:' paragraph is appended social engineering. Asks for PIN + national ID. No counterparty / proper txn ID format (5 digits not 10) / fee / date.
